name: Persistence and Execution at Scale via GPO Scheduled Task
notes:
This rule detects lateral movement using GPO scheduled task.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden
SIGMA Title: Persistence and Execution at Scale via GPO Scheduled Task
SIGMA Description: Detect lateral movement using GPO scheduled task, usually used to deploy ransomware at scale


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access, (5001469) Failure Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
when the event matches Share Name (custom) contains any of SYSVOL
when the event matches File Path (custom) contains any of ScheduledTasks.xml
when the event matches Accesses (custom) contains any of WriteData
TD_list: APPLY Persistence and Execution at Scale via GPO Scheduled Task on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access, (5001469) Failure Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
AND when the event matches Share Name (custom) contains any of SYSVOL
AND when the event matches File Path (custom) contains any of ScheduledTasks.xml
AND when the event matches Accesses (custom) contains any of WriteData
RED_list: Event name: Persistence and Execution at Scale via GPO Scheduled Task
Event description: Detects lateral movement using GPO scheduled task.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
